products.name: MacBook Pro 16" (M4 Max)
products.description: The peak of creative performance. Featuring the M4 Max chip, stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, and unified memory for seamless 8K video editing and 3D rendering.

products.name: Precision 7680 Mobile Workstation
products.description: Desktop-class power in a mobile chassis. ISV certified for high-end engineering, cinematic rendering, and complex architectural simulations.

products.name: ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12
products.description: The legendary business standard. Ultra-light carbon fiber chassis, best-in-class keyboard, and enterprise-grade security for global leadership.

products.name: Razer Blade 16 (Mercury)
products.description: Minimalist exterior, devastating performance. Powered by RTX 4090, this Mercury Edition is designed for professionals who play as hard as they work.

products.name: Mac Studio (M2 Ultra)
products.description: The ultimate creator station. Massive connectivity and transformative power in a compact footprint. Designed for the most demanding pro workflows.

products.name: ZBook Studio G11 Workstation
products.description: Combining sleek design with professional power. The ZBook Studio is built for creators who need reliability and high color accuracy on the go.

products.name: ThinkPad P1 Gen 7
products.description: The perfect balance of power and portability. A thin-and-light mobile workstation designed for high-performance computing in the field.

products.name: ROG Zephyrus G16 (2024)
products.description: Elegance meets pure speed. 240Hz OLED display and RTX graphics in an ultra-slim magnesium-aluminum chassis with industrial precision.

products.name: ExpertBook B9 OLED
products.description: World's lightest 14" business laptop. Crafted from premium lithium-magnesium alloy for the frequent traveler who demands zero compromise.

products.name: QuantumWorks Custom Tower
products.description: The absolute ceiling of computing. Liquid-cooled Ryzen 9 and Dual RTX 4090s. Built for AI training, massive data processing, and 8K simulation.

products.name: Surface Laptop Studio 2
products.description: The most powerful Surface ever. A transformative design that shifts from a laptop to a creative canvas for professional digital artistry.

products.name: Elite Dragonfly G4
products.description: Define your success. Iconic design meets incredible battery life and AI-enhanced conferencing for the modern hybrid leader.

products.name: ProArt Studiobook 16 OLED
products.description: Born for creative pros. Featuring the ASUS Dial for precise control in Adobe apps and a color-accurate 3.2K OLED 120Hz display.

products.name: Legion Pro 7i (Gen 9)
products.description: Dominance through cooling. AI-tuned performance with the Legion Coldfront system and a high-refresh display for competitive excellence.

products.name: XPS 16 (Lunar Gray)
products.description: Minimalist art, massive power. A virtually borderless InfinityEdge display and seamless glass haptics for a uniquely modern workspace.

products.name: Z2 Mini G9 Workstation
products.description: Incredible power in a micro footprint. ISV certified for 2D/3D design and capable of powering up to 8 displays from a single compact unit.

products.name: Creator Z17 HX Studio
products.description: Tech meets Aesthetic. A CNC-milled chassis combined with the power of RTX Ada for the ultimate studio mobile workstation.

products.name: Blade 14 (Carbon Black)
products.description: Small footprint, big impact. The world's most powerful 14-inch gaming laptop, now with AMD Ryzen 9 AI performance.

products.name: Spectre x360 2-in-1
products.description: Luxury performance that adapts to you. A high-resolution 2-in-1 that transitions from business presentation to professional sketchpad instantly.

products.name: Mac Pro (M2 Ultra Rack)
products.description: The absolute pinnacle of the Mac. PCIe expansion meets the brute force of M2 Ultra for massive studio-grade rendering and production racks.
